engineGuide.h2: Dodge Ram 1500 Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide

entries.title: 5.7L Petrol
entries.history: Early-generation Hemi V8 powering DS Ram 1500 models; known for strong torque but lifter/cam wear issues.
commonFailures: Hydraulic lifter collapse 60k-100k miles causing Hemi tick and misfires
Camshaft lobe wear reducing valve lift and engine performance
VVT solenoid oil pressure faults triggering check engine lights
entries.cta: Get quotes for EZH Dodge Ram 1500 engine replacement

entries.history: Updated Hemi V8 with revised lifters and cam profile; most common replacement code for UK Ram 1500s.
compatibleVariants: Big Horn, Laramie, Limited, Rebel, Tradesman
commonFailures: Lifter failure still possible on high-mileage units despite revisions
Oil consumption increases after 100k miles on some examples
Timing chain tensioner wear causing cold-start rattles
entries.cta: Get quotes for ESF Dodge Ram 1500 engine replacement

entries.title: 5.7L Petrol (eTorque)
entries.history: Mild-hybrid Hemi with 48V eTorque system; improved fuel economy and low-end torque for DT generation.
compatibleVariants: Big Horn eTorque, Laramie eTorque, Rebel eTorque, Limited eTorque
commonFailures: eTorque 48V battery degradation affecting start-stop function
Hybrid system communication faults requiring specialist diagnostics
Standard Hemi lifter issues still applicable on high-mileage units
entries.cta: Get quotes for ETH Dodge Ram 1500 engine replacement

entries.title: 3.6L Petrol
entries.history: Entry-level Pentastar V6 offering balanced performance and efficiency across all Ram 1500 trims.
commonFailures: Oil pump failure on early units; updated pump recommended during rebuild

Cylinder head cracking rare but documented on overheated examples

commonProblems.h2: Dodge Ram 1500 Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Dodge Ram 1500's 5.7L Hemi V8 and 3.6L Pentastar V6 dominate UK replacement demand, with lifter collapse, cam wear and oil pump issues most frequently reported. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Use the problem groups below to assess repair options and compare quotes.

problems.h4: Hemi Lifter Collapse - Why Dodge Ram 1500 5.7L Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: Dodge Ram 1500 Big Horn, Laramie, Rebel, Tradesman (2009-2023, EZH/ESF/ETH 5.7L Hemi)
problems.rootCause: Hydraulic lifter design allows oil starvation under certain conditions, causing collapse and cam lobe damage.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace all 16 lifters, inspect cam lobes, flush oil system
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught early before cam damage; 30k-50k mile extension

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace lifters, camshaft, timing components, full gasket set
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses core failure; suitable if block/head undamaged; 60k+ mile potential

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt Hemi with upgraded lifters, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Most cost-effective for high-mileage or severely damaged units; like-new reliability

problems.recommendation: On a Dodge Ram 1500 worth £15,000-£35,000, if the Hemi tick is caught early with no cam damage, preventative lifter replacement offers good value. However, once cam lobes are scored, full engine replacement with upgraded components is often more economical than extensive in-car repairs.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt EZH/ESF Hemi engine prices for your Dodge Ram 1500

problems.h4: Pentastar Oil Pump Failure - Why Dodge Ram 1500 3.6L Engines Lose Pressure
problems.affectedModels: Dodge Ram 1500 Tradesman, Big Horn, Laramie (2009-2023, ERG/ESG 3.6L Pentastar)
problems.rootCause: Early oil pump design prone to wear; low pressure causes timing chain tensioner failure and potential engine damage.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace oil pump, timing chain tensioners, flush system
repairOptions.longevity: Preventative fix if caught before chain skip; extends life 40k-60k miles

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace full timing set, oil pump, guides, seals
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses chain wear; suitable if no valve/piston damage occurred

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt V6 with updated oil pump, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for high-mileage units or those with existing damage

problems.recommendation: If your Ram 1500 shows low oil pressure but no rattling, preventative oil pump replacement is cost-effective. However, if timing chain noise is present, replacement with an updated pump unit is often smarter than repeated repairs.
problems.cta: Get quotes for ERG Pentastar engine replacement for your Dodge Ram 1500

problems.h4: EcoDiesel Emissions System Faults - Why Dodge Ram 1500 3.0L Engines Enter Limp Mode
problems.affectedModels: Dodge Ram 1500 Big Horn, Laramie, Rebel EcoDiesel (2014-2023, EXN 3.0L)
problems.rootCause: DEF/SCR system components (injectors, sensors, dosing module) fail due to crystallisation, contamination or electrical faults.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace faulty injector, sensor or dosing module; system reset
repairOptions.longevity: Viable for isolated component failure; 20k-40k mile extension if maintained

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace injector, dosing module, NOx sensors, clean/replace DPF
repairOptions.longevity: Comprehensive fix for multiple faults; suitable if engine mechanically sound

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt EXN unit, emissions system reset, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Most reliable solution for high-mileage units or repeated emissions failures

problems.recommendation: For isolated DEF faults under 70k miles, component replacement is sensible. However, if your Ram 1500 has multiple emissions warnings or high mileage, a rebuilt engine with updated components often proves more cost-effective long-term.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt EXN EcoDiesel engine prices for your Dodge Ram 1500

problems.h4: Camshaft Lobe Wear - Why Dodge Ram 1500 Hemi Engines Lose Power
problems.affectedModels: Dodge Ram 1500 Big Horn, Laramie, Rebel (2009-2023, EZH/ESF/ETH 5.7L Hemi)
problems.rootCause: Collapsed lifters cause metal-on-metal contact with cam lobes, wearing them down and reducing valve lift.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace camshaft, all lifters, timing components, full gasket set
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses core failure; viable if block/head undamaged; 60k+ mile potential

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt Hemi with upgraded lifters/cam, bench-tested, warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Most cost-effective for high-mileage units or those with secondary damage

problems.recommendation: Once cam lobes show wear, in-car repair becomes complex and expensive. For Ram 1500s over 80k miles, replacement with a rebuilt unit featuring upgraded components typically offers better value and reliability.
problems.cta: Get quotes for ESF Hemi engine replacement for your Dodge Ram 1500

problems.h4: Engine Stalling & No-Start Issues - Electrical & Fuel System Failures
problems.affectedModels: All Dodge Ram 1500 variants (2009-2023, all engine codes)
problems.rootCause: Fuel pump failure, crank position sensor faults, or PCM communication errors causing intermittent stalling or no-start conditions.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace faulty sensor or fuel pump module; diagnostic reset
repairOptions.longevity: Viable for isolated electrical faults; 30k-50k mile extension if no secondary damage

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Reprogram or replace PCM, update software, full system diagnostics
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses complex electrical faults; suitable if engine mechanically sound

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Engine with ECU Sync
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine, ECU reflash/sync, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best solution for high-mileage units with multiple electrical/mechanical issues

problems.recommendation: For isolated sensor or pump failures under 70k miles, targeted repair is cost-effective. However, if stalling is accompanied by mechanical symptoms (noise, smoke), full engine replacement with ECU synchronization often proves more reliable long-term.
problems.cta: Compare Dodge Ram 1500 engine replacement prices for your variant

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Dodge Ram 1500
finalCta.paragraph: Whether you're facing Hemi lifter collapse, Pentastar oil pump issues, or EcoDiesel emissions faults, EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Dodge Ram 1500 specialists. Every rebuilt engine includes upgraded components addressing the original failure point, bench testing, and a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty with nationwide delivery. Compare quotes today and get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Dodge Ram 1500 Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Dodge Ram 1500 and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineYears.h2: Dodge Ram 1500 Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the Dodge Ram 1500's UK production timeline from 2009-2023, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The DS-generation Ram 1500 launched in the UK with familiar Hemi V8 and new Pentastar V6 options, establishing the platform that would dominate UK imports for a decade.
keyChanges: DS chassis introduced with updated suspension and interior
5.7L Hemi EZH and 3.6L Pentastar ERG engines available from launch
Right-hand drive conversions began for UK market compliance
knownFor: Strong towing capability and comfortable ride quality
Early EZH Hemi lifter issues emerging on high-mileage examples
Pentastar ERG oil pump updates recommended during servicing
years.cta: Get quotes for 2009-2012 Dodge Ram 1500 replacement engines
years.ticker: Ram 1500 Hemi tick repair • Ram 1500 oil pump replacement • Ram 1500 engine code lookup

years.description: The mid-cycle DS facelift introduced the updated ESF Hemi code with revised lifters, while EcoDiesel joined the lineup for efficiency-focused buyers.
keyChanges: ESF Hemi code replaced EZH with updated lifter design
EXN 3.0L EcoDiesel introduced for improved fuel economy
Interior and exterior refresh with updated technology features
knownFor: ESF Hemi still susceptible to lifter failure despite revisions
EcoDiesel emissions system complexity requiring specialist knowledge
Strong residual values driving continued UK import demand
years.ticker: Ram 1500 ESF lifter replacement • Ram 1500 EcoDiesel DEF fault • Ram 1500 engine supply and fit

years.description: The all-new DT-generation Ram 1500 brought significant weight reduction, improved efficiency and the introduction of eTorque mild-hybrid technology to the UK market.
keyChanges: New DT chassis with aluminium-intensive construction
eTorque mild-hybrid system introduced on select V6 and V8 engines
ESG Pentastar and ETH Hemi codes joined the lineup
knownFor: Improved fuel economy and refinement over DS generation
eTorque battery and BSG issues emerging on early DT examples
Hemi lifter concerns persist despite ongoing design revisions
years.cta: Enquire about Dodge Ram 1500 2019-2020 engine availability
years.ticker: Ram 1500 eTorque battery replacement • Ram 1500 DT engine compatibility • Ram 1500 hybrid system fault

years.description: The final DT production years saw the introduction of the extreme-performance TRX with supercharged Hellcat Hemi, alongside continued refinement of mainstream powertrains.
keyChanges: TRX variant launched with 6.2L supercharged Hellcat Hemi
Final production updates to ESF/ETH Hemi and ESG Pentastar
UK supply focused on remaining new stock and imports
knownFor: TRX Hellcat requiring specialist rebuild expertise and parts sourcing
Continued Hemi lifter concerns on high-mileage mainstream examples
Strong demand for low-mileage DT examples driving replacement market
years.cta: Get quotes for 2021-2023 Dodge Ram 1500 replacement engines
years.ticker: Ram 1500 TRX engine rebuild • Ram 1500 Hellcat supercharger repair • Ram 1500 DT engine warranty

faq.h2: Dodge Ram 1500 Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Dodge Ram 1500 engine replacement cost UK?
items.answer: Typical rebuilt engine costs range from £2,200 for a 3.6L Pentastar to £7,200 for a 3.0L EcoDiesel, with 5.7L Hemi units averaging £2,800-£6,500 depending on code and condition.
keyPoints: Prices reflect supply-only rebuilt engines from UK specialists
Hemi codes EZH/ESF/ETH dominate replacement demand and pricing
EcoDiesel EXN units cost more due to emissions system complexity
Supply & fit adds £800-£2,200 depending on garage location
items.cta: Compare rebuilt Dodge Ram 1500 engine prices for your variant

items.question: What engine codes fit my Dodge Ram 1500?
items.answer: Your Ram 1500 uses either EZH/ESF/ETH (5.7L Hemi), ERG/ESG (3.6L Pentastar), EXN (3.0L EcoDiesel) or Hellcat (6.2L TRX) - verify via VIN decoder or registration lookup.
keyPoints: Enter your registration above for instant code identification
Hemi codes EZH (early) and ESF (late) are not always interchangeable
eTorque variants (ETH/ESG) require hybrid-aware rebuild specialists
EcoDiesel EXN needs emissions-system compatible replacement units
items.cta: Use our Dodge Ram 1500 engine code lookup tool now

items.question: Is it worth replacing a Dodge Ram 1500 engine?
items.answer: Yes, if your Ram 1500 is otherwise in good condition - rebuilt engines cost significantly less than vehicle replacement and restore reliability with warranty coverage.
keyPoints: Rebuilt Hemi engines cost £2,800-£6,500 vs £15k+ vehicle replacement
12-month warranty on rebuilt units reduces long-term risk
High residual values make engine replacement economically sensible
Compare quotes to find best value for your specific variant
items.cta: Calculate if Dodge Ram 1500 engine replacement makes financial sense

items.question: How long does a reconditioned Dodge Ram 1500 engine last?
items.answer: Properly reconditioned Ram 1500 engines typically last 60,000-100,000+ miles when maintained correctly, with upgraded components addressing original failure points.
keyPoints: Upgraded lifters and oil pumps extend Hemi/Pentastar longevity
Regular oil changes with correct specification critical for durability
12-month unlimited mileage warranty covers early failures
Specialist rebuilders address known weaknesses during reconditioning
items.cta: Find Dodge Ram 1500 engines with extended warranty coverage

items.question: Do I need to reprogram ECU after Ram 1500 engine replacement?
items.answer: Yes, most Ram 1500 engine swaps require ECU reflash or PCM synchronization to ensure proper communication with the replacement engine's sensors and systems.
keyPoints: eTorque variants (ETH/ESG) always require hybrid system calibration
Hemi and Pentastar engines need VIN programming for immobiliser
Specialist garages include ECU sync in supply & fit packages
Failure to reprogram can cause no-start or limp mode conditions
items.cta: Book Dodge Ram 1500 engine supply & fit with ECU sync included

items.question: Can I fit a different engine in my Dodge Ram 1500?
items.answer: While technically possible, engine swaps in the Ram 1500 require extensive modification to wiring, ECU, emissions and drivetrain - not recommended for road use without specialist expertise.
keyPoints: Hemi to Pentastar swaps need full wiring harness and ECU changes
EcoDiesel conversions face UK emissions compliance hurdles
TRX Hellcat swaps require supercharger, cooling and fuel system upgrades
Always verify MoT and insurance implications before modification
items.cta: Speak to a Dodge Ram 1500 engine specialist about compatibility

items.question: What warranty comes with a Dodge Ram 1500 replacement engine?
items.answer: All engines supplied through EngineMarket include a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty covering parts and labour for rebuild-related failures.
keyPoints: Warranty valid at any UK garage with prior supplier approval
Covers lifters, camshafts, bearings and other rebuilt components
Excludes damage from misuse, poor maintenance or unrelated failures
Always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier before purchase
items.cta: Compare Dodge Ram 1500 engine warranty terms from UK specialists

items.question: How do I know which Dodge Ram 1500 engine I have?
items.answer: Check your VIN decoder, engine bay stamping, or enter your registration above for instant identification of your Ram 1500's exact engine code and specifications.
keyPoints: Engine code stamped on block near cylinder head (EZH/ESF/ERG/EXN)
VIN decoder reveals factory-fitted engine at time of manufacture
Registration lookup via DVLA confirms current specification
Specialist diagnostics can verify code if documentation is unclear
items.cta: Identify your Dodge Ram 1500 engine code instantly now

items.question: Are used Dodge Ram 1500 engines reliable?
items.answer: Used engines can be reliable if sourced from reputable breakers with compression testing, service history verification and warranty coverage - always inspect before purchase.
keyPoints: Request compression/leak-down test results before buying used
Verify mileage and service history matches engine condition
Budget for ancillary replacement (gaskets, sensors, fluids) on installation
3-6 month warranty typical; upgrade to 12-month via our network
items.cta: Check tested used Dodge Ram 1500 engine availability UK

items.question: How long does Ram 1500 engine replacement take?
items.answer: Supply-only engines typically dispatch within 3-7 days; supply & fit installations require 2-4 days garage time plus delivery, depending on parts availability and workshop schedule.
keyPoints: Popular codes (ESF, ERG) often available for next-day dispatch
Specialist engines (EXN, Hellcat) may require 7-14 day lead time
Supply & fit bookings include pre-installation diagnostics and testing
Nationwide delivery available to your chosen garage or home address
items.cta: Book your Dodge Ram 1500 engine replacement appointment today
